description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, graphic print on the front and printed brand name on the back Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Sport brand adidas have come up with this simple, feminine T-shirt. Great style and exemplary comfort combined, this tee is a sure wardrobe favourite - pair it with denim skirts or skinny jeans. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
